markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Ceddanne Rafaela is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Ceddanne Rafaela starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Ceddanne Rafaela is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Ceddanne Rafaela is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on home runs recorded.
